nodes.name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Sesame Bake
nodes.description: name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Sesame Bake | short_description: Roast chicken thighs with quinoa, broccoli, and carrots in a sesame style bake for a protein-rich, veggie-forward dinner. | meal_suggestio
nodes.premise: Meal: Roast Chicken Dinner — Sesame Bake - name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Sesame Bake | short_description: Roast chicken thighs with quinoa, broccoli, and carrots in a sesame style bake for a protein-rich, veggie-forward dinner. | meal_suggestion: Great for a satisfying, make ahead dinner. For extra flavor, consider topping with sesame seeds before roasting. Serve with a simple side salad to boost greens. | nutrition_note: Protein-dense meal from chicken thighs and quinoa; includes fiber from quinoa and vegetables. Provides vitamins A and C from broccoli and carrots, plus minerals like iron and potassium. Moderate fat from chicken thighs; balanced carbohydrates from quinoa and vegetables; low in added sugars.

nodes.name: Pasta Primavera — Classic Style
nodes.description: name: Pasta Primavera — Classic Style | short_description: Classic Pasta Primavera featuring pasta, zucchini, mushrooms, tomato, olive oil, and parmesan—a light, veggie-forward Italian-inspired dish.
nodes.premise: Meal: Pasta Primavera — Classic Style - name: Pasta Primavera — Classic Style | short_description: Classic Pasta Primavera featuring pasta, zucchini, mushrooms, tomato, olive oil, and parmesan—a light, veggie-forward Italian-inspired dish. | meal_suggestion: Add a lean protein such as grilled chicken, shrimp, or chickpeas to increase protein; use whole-grain pasta for extra fiber; serve with a side salad to boost vegetables. | nutrition_note: Balanced carbohydrate-forward dish with vegetables for fiber and micronutrients, healthy fats from olive oil, and calcium from parmesan. To boost protein, add grilled chicken, shrimp, or legumes. Consider using whole-grain pasta for more fiber; monitor sodium from cheese.

nodes.premise: Meal: Teriyaki Chicken Dinner — Smoky Style - name: Teriyaki Chicken Dinner — Smoky Style | short_description: Smoky teriyaki chicken with vegetables and rice | meal_suggestion: Grill the chicken with a smoky spice rub (paprika or chipotle), serve with 1 cup cooked brown rice and 1.5–2 cups mixed vegetables; use low-sodium teriyaki or homemade to limit sodium المحتوى. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich chicken with carbs from rice and fiber from vegetables. Teriyaki sauce adds sugars and sodium, so consider a low-sodium or homemade sauce to reduce salt; portion control helps manage calories.
